customCommands.name: odibi-discover
customCommands.prompt: Use the map_environment MCP tool to discover data sources. Show what you find.
customCommands.description: Discover data sources in a connection

customCommands.name: odibi-profile
customCommands.prompt: Use the profile_source MCP tool to analyze this data source. Show schema, stats, and suggestions.

customCommands.name: odibi-build
customCommands.prompt: Build an odibi pipeline for this use case. Use list_patterns and apply_pattern_template MCP tools. Generate valid YAML.

slashCommands.name: odibi
slashCommands.description: Ask Continue to help with odibi pipelines using MCP tools
